text: Being here, I am struck by the intersection of curiosity and modernity. The clean lines and open glass of the architecture make me feel exposed, as though transparency and observation are central to this environment. The vibrant, bold colors draw me into a space intended for innovation; the "R+D" wall boldly proclaims a devotion to research and experimentation. Standing in the hallway, I am both a spectator and a subject, immersed in a carefully curated realm of ideas, feeling a quiet excitement and anticipation for discovery.
